summary: Taiki has pivoted from a successful bearish stance on Ethereum to explicitly calling a market bottom and anticipating higher Bitcoin prices.
narrative: After spending late 2025 profiting from shorting Ethereum, his most recent video declares 'The Bottom Is In' for the crypto markets. He now argues that structural factors and marginal buying could propel BTC higher, suggesting his previous bearish thesis has fully played out and a new uptrend is beginning.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
